reservations.question: Do I need a reservation at Coco Maya?
reservations.answer: Reservations are strongly recommended, especially for brunch and Friday or Saturday evenings. You can book a table online through our reservation system, and walk-ins are welcome based on availability.

large-groups.question: Is Coco Maya good for large groups?
large-groups.answer: Yes. Beyond regular dining, we host private and semi-private events for groups of 20 up to a full venue buyout of 180 guests. See our Private Events page for capacity details and how to book.

parking.question: Is there parking near Coco Maya?
parking.answer: Coco Maya is located at {{street}} in Little Italy, San Diego. Street parking and nearby public lots are available, and the neighborhood is walkable from most Little Italy hotels.

outdoor-seating.question: Does Coco Maya have outdoor seating?
outdoor-seating.answer: Yes. Our elevated open-air patio is one of the most distinctive spaces in Little Italy, alongside a glass atrium bar and an indoor dining room for cooler evenings.

private-event.question: Can I host a private event at Coco Maya?
private-event.answer: Yes. We host bachelorette parties, birthday celebrations, rehearsal dinners, corporate events, baby showers, and full evening buyouts. Email us at {{email}} with your date and group size to start planning.

dietary.question: Does Coco Maya accommodate dietary restrictions?
dietary.answer: Our kitchen can accommodate most dietary needs, including vegetarian and gluten-conscious requests. Let your server know when you arrive, or note any restrictions when booking a private event.

dogs.question: Is Coco Maya dog-friendly?
dogs.answer: Well-behaved dogs are welcome on our outdoor patio. Please keep pets leashed and clear of walkways for other guests.

contact.question: How do I contact Coco Maya directly?
contact.answerTemplate: Call us at {{phone}} or email {{email}}. For private events, include your preferred date and headcount so we can respond with availability.
